Forest Management & Wildlife Services

ForestWild Consultants, LLC

Professional forestry consulting rooted in the Southern landscape — stewarding timberland, wildlife, and the land's long-term legacy.

Request a Consultation Our Services

Based in Florence, Alabama

Serving AL · TN · MS & surrounding states

Who We Are

Grounded in the Southern Forest

ForestWild Consultants LLC is a professional forestry and wildlife consulting firm headquartered in Florence, Alabama. We bring hands-on expertise in timber management, wildlife habitat enhancement, and land stewardship across the hardwood and pine forests of the Southeast.

"Across my career I've managed properties from 20 acres to 640,000 acres — family farms, institutional timberland, trust properties, military land. Every one of them was different, and every landowner had different goals. Our approach has never changed: we look through your lens, not ours. We determine what your land needs to achieve your vision — and where that vision is still taking shape, we help bring it into focus."

Before I ever walked a timber tract professionally, I served as a U.S. Army light infantry officer, deploying to Iraq and Afghanistan and spending most of my service in the 10th Mountain Division. That time in uniform shaped my professional life more than anything I could ever imagine. The values I carried home — duty, integrity, selfless service — are the same ones I bring to every landowner I work with today.

I do my best to live the Ranger Creed in everything I do, and a firm faith in God leads me in all of it. I don't claim to be the best at what I do — but I vow to work hard, think carefully, and be honest with you every step of the way.

🎓B.S. Operations Management — Auburn University, 2000
🎓M.S. Forest Resources — Clemson University, 2007
📜Registered Forester (RF)
🌿Alabama Commercial Pesticide Applicator
🪵Alabama Professional Logging Manager (PLM) Certified
🏡Alabama Real Estate Salesperson License

Casey Newton & Family — Florence, Alabama

U.S. Army — Afghanistan, 2004

Casey Newton — Owner, ForestWild Consultants LLC

What We Do

Forest & Wildlife Services

🌲

Forest Management Planning

Comprehensive forest management plans tailored to your land's species composition, soil types, and ownership goals. Timber stand improvement, reforestation, and long-range planning.

🔥

Prescribed Fire & TSI

Prescribed burning plans and timber stand improvement treatments to reduce fuels, control competition, improve wildlife habitat, and restore open woodland structure.

🌱

Reforestation & Site Prep

Seedling procurement, planting supervision, site preparation recommendations, and post-planting monitoring for pine, hardwood, and native species plantings.

🪵

Timber Sales

Timber markets across the Southeast have been challenging and unpredictable over the past decade — and we won't pretend otherwise. Every tract is different. The species, volume, product mix, and location all determine whether the timing is right for a sale and what that sale is likely to return.

Our job is to give you an honest assessment. If your property has what it takes for a successful timber sale today, we'll tell you — and we'll go get you the best price the market will offer. If the timing isn't right, we'll be straight with you about that too, and we'll put a plan in place to improve the stand, build value, and position your timber for a stronger sale when the market and your property are both ready.

What we won't do is push you into a sale that doesn't serve your interests.

A well-managed loblolly pine stand ready for its next chapter

🦌

Wildlife Habitat Enhancement

Food plot design, habitat structure improvements, and prescribed management for white-tailed deer, turkey, quail, waterfowl, and non-game species.

🏕️

Hunting Leases & Leasing Services

For hunting lease listings, lease management, and leasing services, we proudly refer clients to our sister company — HuntEngage — the dedicated platform for connecting landowners and hunters across the South.

Visit HuntEngage →
📋

Boundary & Inventory Services

Property line location, timber and land inventories, GIS mapping, and delineation of management compartments and habitat types for accurate planning.

💰

Conservation Programs

Assistance enrolling in USDA programs including EQIP, RCPP, and CRP, as well as forest stewardship plans.

Why ForestWild

Local Expertise, Long-Term Thinking

We're not a national firm sending a stranger to walk your land. ForestWild Consultants is your neighbor — we understand the soils, the timber markets, the wildlife patterns, and the culture of the Southern forestlands we work in.

Every acre is different. Every landowner has different goals. We listen first, then build a management strategy that reflects your land's true potential.

01

Site-Specific Recommendations

On-the-ground assessments, not generic prescriptions. We walk your property and study your land before recommending anything.

02

Independent, Unbiased Advice

As consultants, we work for you — not for timber buyers, mills, or vendors. You receive objective guidance that serves your interests.

03

Multi-Resource Management

We integrate timber, wildlife, water, aesthetics, and recreational values into unified plans — because healthy forests deliver on every front.

04

Regulatory & Program Knowledge

Navigating USDA programs, state forestry incentives, and environmental regulations so you capture every available benefit.

Where We Work

Serving the Southern Forest Region

Based in Florence, Alabama, ForestWild Consultants serves landowners across the heart of the South's most productive forestland. We regularly work throughout Alabama, Tennessee, and Mississippi, and accept projects in neighboring states on a case-by-case basis.
